1) Verbiage for the "thank you" text that will go out from the
BD within a few hours of signing someone up.
Congratulations and thank you for signing up with (your
company). Our commitment is to deliver the best outcome with 1
on 1 training. Your dedicated trainer will be in touch within 7
days to arrange a personal introduction. Remember your
Certificate III is 100% funded so no charges will apply
2) A script for a v-mail recording that the trainers will leave
after their first attempt at contact results in an answering
machine.
Hi ‘name’, this is ‘name’ from (your company). Quick call just to
introduce myself to you and set a convenient time to meet up.
Please call or text me back on ‘number’ to arrange a suitable
date/time. Thank you
3) An accompanying text that they'll send to the student after
they leave a voice message.
Hi ‘name’, this is ‘name’ from (your company). Just wanted to
make a personal introduction as your trainer for your cert III.
Looking forward to meeting up with you as soon as you can.
Please call or text back with your availability. Thank you
If you can write first drafts for those, I will put on as many
finishing touches as necessary
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
